author: Agent C

source.doc_status: originals not yet recovered into data/raw/process_docs/; rules authored from briefing extract — most are placeholders pending source confirmation.

purpose: Captures off-happy-path handling: cancellations, reversals, aging triggers, impairment review, partial inputs, and refusal posture.

rules.name: Lot or contract cancellation

action.rule: Reverse the most recent posted GL entry chain for the affected scope (lot/phase/property). For mid-lifecycle cancellations (e.g., MDA executed but contract terminated), reverse in inverse order of posting: warranty → water → indirect → direct → land → MDA-day land move.
action.do_not: Do not delete original entries; post reversals with explicit cancellation_event linkage.

rules.verification_note: Cancellation handling not explicitly documented in briefing extract. Rule is inferred from standard accounting practice; needs source-doc confirmation.

rules.name: Refusal when event required-fields missing

trigger.condition: Any event from clickup_gl_event_map_v1.json with one or more required_inputs marked blocks_event_if_missing=true that resolve to null/empty.

action.rule: Tools (detect_accounting_events, generate_per_lot_output, etc.) MUST refuse to assert the event has fired. Emit a checklist of missing fields and the system that owns each.
action.do_not: Do not infer values. Do not substitute a default for FMV at Transfer or Sale Price. Do not allocate from partial inputs.

rules.verification_note: Aligns with hard rule from PROJECT_STATE.md: missing ≠ $0; unknown ≠ zero.

rules.name: MDA Day partial tie (2 of 3 lot counts)

trigger.condition: Two of {clickup_lot_count, mda_lot_count, workbook_lot_count} present and matching, third missing or different.

action.rule: Emit a 'partial' status, NOT 'pass' and NOT 'fail'. Do not post the MDA JE. Surface which two sources agree and which is the outlier.
action.next_steps: Operator manually reconciles before re-running detect_accounting_events.

rules.verification_note: Briefing explicitly calls out 'partial' as a distinct status. Aligns with risk mitigation in plan.

rules.name: WIP aging review

trigger.condition: 131-300 (WIP Land) or 132-500 (Direct) or 132-700 (Water) balance for a job has been non-zero for > N months without lot-sale activity.

action.rule: Surface job for impairment / write-down review by Finance. Do not auto-post any adjustment.
action.next_steps: Finance evaluates whether to maintain, write-down, or reclassify. Decision recorded as a manual JE with explicit narrative.

rules.verification_note: Aging thresholds are placeholders — source-owner Finance to confirm. The trigger pattern (aging non-zero WIP) is standard but specific months need ratification.

rules.name: Impairment review trigger

conditions_any_of: Phase has been in (LND) DEVELOPING > 36 months without progressing
Sales price per lot in workbook falls below allocated cost per lot by margin > 25%
Property carries 131-100 (Raw Land) without MDA execution > 24 months
Cancellation rate on a community > 30% in trailing 12 months

action.rule: Surface property/community for Finance impairment evaluation. Tools do not compute or post impairment.
action.next_steps: Finance + accounting policy applies; if impairment recognized, manual JE with narrative and source-owner sign-off.

rules.verification_note: Impairment thresholds and trigger composition are inferred from standard practice. Source-doc may specify different triggers.

trigger.condition: An event_id is detected for the same scope (lot/phase/property) within N days of a previously detected event of the same id.

action.rule: Refuse to post the second event. Surface both detections with timestamps and trigger sources.
action.next_steps: Operator decides whether the second is a true duplicate (suppress) or a legitimate re-trigger (manual override).

rules.name: Refusal for unratified allocation method

trigger.condition: Any tool attempting to compute an allocation using an allocation_methods_v1.json method with ratified=false.

action.rule: Tools MUST refuse to compute. Return the method's refusal_reason and pointer to source-owner sign-off pathway.
action.do_not: Do not approximate the unratified method using a ratified method as a substitute.

rules.verification_note: Mirrors v2.1 hard rule on unratified methods (range-row hold).

trigger.condition: Lot sale SIH event where Sale Counterparty Type != 'internal_homebuilder' OR FMV at Transfer is null.

action.rule: Refuse to fire SIH event. Surface as candidate for reclassification to 3RDY or for input correction.
action.do_not: Do not auto-reclassify. The path determines the GL accounts and revenue posting.

rules.name: Stale source file warning

trigger.condition: Any tool reading a source file (per state/bcp_dev/source_file_manifest_v1.json) where last_modified > freshness_caveat_days.

action.rule: Emit a warning embedded in tool output: 'WARNING: source file <path> is N days old; values may be stale.'
action.do_not: Do not refuse outright; the staleness is informational.

rules.verification_note: Pattern aligns with v2.1 freshness_caveat handling.

open_questions: Source-doc-confirmed thresholds for EXC-004 (WIP aging) and EXC-005 (impairment).
Whether cancellation handling (EXC-001) requires distinct rules per cancellation type (pre-MDA vs post-MDA vs post-plat).
Whether intercompany SIH transfer at FMV requires separate revenue/cost posting per legal entity beyond the briefing's single transfer pattern.
